title: Remove Pages from PDF — Delete PDF Pages Offline
description: Delete unwanted pages from your PDF file securely inside your browser. Fast and completely secure.

sections.title: Why Remove Pages Locally?
sections.content: Deleting sensitive or unnecessary pages from your document should be done on your device, not a server. We ensure 100% privacy.

steps.title: Open PDF
steps.description: Load the PDF you want to clean up.

steps.title: Select Pages to Delete
steps.description: Hover over pages and click the trash icon to mark them for deletion.

steps.title: Export Clean PDF
steps.description: Download your new PDF without the deleted pages.

sections.title: 100% Secure Local Processing
sections.content: All operations are performed directly on your local device. We use advanced WebAssembly technology to process your documents without ever uploading them to external servers, ensuring complete privacy.

sections.title: Total Deletion Privacy
sections.content: When you remove a page, it is permanently deleted from the document in your browser memory before saving.

sections.title: Instant Page Removal
sections.content: Extracting and deleting pages from even a 1000-page document takes milliseconds using our optimized WASM engine.

faqs.a: Once you download the new PDF, the deleted pages are permanently removed from that file. Your original file remains untouched.

faqs.q: Do I need to upload my PDF?
faqs.a: No. The entire page removal process happens locally in your web browser.

faqs.q: Is there a limit to how many pages I can delete?
faqs.a: No, you can delete as many pages as you want, completely free.

faqs.q: Will the layout of remaining pages change?
faqs.a: No, the remaining pages will retain their exact original formatting and layout.

faqs.q: Can I select multiple pages at once?
faqs.a: Yes, you can click on multiple pages to mark them all for deletion simultaneously.
